polynomialBasisType.description: Determines how the coefficient arrays are evaluated.

CHEBYSHEV.description: Chebyshev polynomials of the first kind T_n(x). Most common for ephemeris fitting due to minimax approximation properties.

LEGENDRE.description: Legendre polynomials P_n(x). Orthogonal on [-1, 1] with unit weight function.

HERMITE.description: Hermite interpolating polynomials. Matches both function values and derivatives at nodes.

LAGRANGE.description: Lagrange interpolating polynomials. Exact interpolation through specified nodes.

POWER_SERIES.description: Standard power series (monomial basis): c0 + c1*x + c2*x^2 + ...

ppeAnomalyType.description: Anomaly type flag for orbital element records.

MEAN_ANOMALY.description: Mean anomaly (linear in time for Keplerian motion).

ECCENTRIC_ANOMALY.description: Eccentric anomaly (auxiliary angle in the Kepler equation).

sizeShapeProfile.description: Orbital element parameterization for the first element (size/shape).

SMA.description: Semi-major axis (km). Standard for elliptical orbits.

R_PERIAPSIS.description: Radius of periapsis (km). Preferred for hyperbolic orbits.

trajectoryType.description: CCSDS 502.0-B-3 Section 7 specifies multiple trajectory state types.

CARTESIAN_PV.description: Cartesian position and velocity (X, Y, Z, X_DOT, Y_DOT, Z_DOT).

CARTESIAN_PVA.description: Cartesian position, velocity, and acceleration (9 components).

POLYNOMIAL_POS.description: Polynomial coefficients for Cartesian position (and optionally velocity). Associated data in POLYNOMIAL_POSITION_RECORDS.

POLYNOMIAL_OE.description: Polynomial coefficients for classical orbital elements. Associated data in POLYNOMIAL_OE_RECORDS.

ORBIT_TYPE.description: Orbit type (Orbit, Landing, Impact, Docked to RSO, roundtrip)

EPOCH_HALF_SPAN.description: The full span is 2 * EPOCH_HALF_SPAN seconds centered on EPOCH_MID.

NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description: Typical values: 8-32 for high-fidelity ephemeris fits.

BASIS_TYPE.description: Polynomial basis type for interpreting the coefficient arrays.

CHEBYSHEV.description: Chebyshev polynomials of the first kind T_n(x). Most common for ephemeris fitting due to minimax approximation properties.

LEGENDRE.description: Legendre polynomials P_n(x). Orthogonal on [-1, 1] with unit weight function.

HERMITE.description: Hermite interpolating polynomials. Matches both function values and derivatives at nodes.

LAGRANGE.description: Lagrange interpolating polynomials. Exact interpolation through specified nodes.

POWER_SERIES.description: Standard power series (monomial basis): c0 + c1*x + c2*x^2 + ...

PPEPositionRecord.description: A single time-segment record of polynomial coefficients for Cartesian position (and optionally velocity). Coefficients are stored per axis.  To evaluate position at time t within this record's validity window: 1. Compute normalized time: tau = (t - EPOCH_MID) / EPOCH_HALF_SPAN where tau is in [-1, +1]. 2. Evaluate the polynomial basis of degree (NUM_COEFFICIENTS - 1) using the coefficients for each axis.  Velocity coefficients, if present, follow the same evaluation procedure. If HAS_VELOCITY_COEFFICIENTS is false, velocity can be obtained by analytically differentiating the position polynomial.

EPOCH_MID.description: Midpoint epoch of this record's validity window (ISO 8601 UTC or TDB).

EPOCH_HALF_SPAN.description: Half-span of the validity window in seconds.

NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description: Number of polynomial coefficients per element.

BASIS_TYPE.description: Polynomial basis type for interpreting the coefficient arrays.

CHEBYSHEV.description: Chebyshev polynomials of the first kind T_n(x). Most common for ephemeris fitting due to minimax approximation properties.

LEGENDRE.description: Legendre polynomials P_n(x). Orthogonal on [-1, 1] with unit weight function.

HERMITE.description: Hermite interpolating polynomials. Matches both function values and derivatives at nodes.

LAGRANGE.description: Lagrange interpolating polynomials. Exact interpolation through specified nodes.

POWER_SERIES.description: Standard power series (monomial basis): c0 + c1*x + c2*x^2 + ...

SIZE_SHAPE_TYPE.description: Parameterization of the first orbital element (SMA vs R_PERIAPSIS).

SMA.description: Semi-major axis (km). Standard for elliptical orbits.

R_PERIAPSIS.description: Radius of periapsis (km). Preferred for hyperbolic orbits.

ANOMALY_TYPE.description: Anomaly type for the sixth orbital element.

MEAN_ANOMALY.description: Mean anomaly (linear in time for Keplerian motion).

ECCENTRIC_ANOMALY.description: Eccentric anomaly (auxiliary angle in the Kepler equation).

MAX_ELEMENT_RESIDUAL.description: Units depend on the element (km for SMA, degrees for angles, dimensionless for ecc).

RMS_ELEMENT_RESIDUAL.description: RMS element fit residual over this segment. Optional quality metric.

PPEOrbitalElementRecord.description: A single time-segment record of polynomial coefficients for classical orbital elements.  The six classical elements are: 1. SMA or R_PERIAPSIS (size/shape) — see SIZE_SHAPE_TYPE 2. Eccentricity (dimensionless) 3. Inclination (degrees) 4. Right Ascension of Ascending Node / RAAN (degrees) 5. Argument of Periapsis (degrees) 6. Anomaly (degrees) — see ANOMALY_TYPE  Evaluation follows the same normalized-time procedure as PPEPositionRecord.

CENTER_NAME.description: Origin of the reference frame (e.g., EARTH, MOON, MARS).

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system used for all epochs in this message.

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

START_TIME.description: Start of the total time span covered by this ephemeris (ISO 8601).

STOP_TIME.description: End of the total time span covered by this ephemeris (ISO 8601).

DEFAULT_BASIS_TYPE.description: Individual records may override this with their own BASIS_TYPE field.

CHEBYSHEV.description: Chebyshev polynomials of the first kind T_n(x). Most common for ephemeris fitting due to minimax approximation properties.

LEGENDRE.description: Legendre polynomials P_n(x). Orthogonal on [-1, 1] with unit weight function.

HERMITE.description: Hermite interpolating polynomials. Matches both function values and derivatives at nodes.

LAGRANGE.description: Lagrange interpolating polynomials. Exact interpolation through specified nodes.

POWER_SERIES.description: Standard power series (monomial basis): c0 + c1*x + c2*x^2 + ...

POSITION_RECORDS.description: Each record covers a time segment; together they span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME].

ORBITAL_ELEMENT_RECORDS.description: Each record covers a time segment; together they span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME].

EPHEMERIS_SOURCE.description: Generating ephemeris source (e.g., "JPL DE440", "HPOP v2.1", "Basilisk chebyPosEphem").

NOMINAL_SEGMENT_SPAN.description: Informational; actual spans are in individual records.

NOMINAL_NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description: Informational; actual counts are in individual records.

PPE.description: Polynomial Ephemeris — top-level message containing metadata and one or more polynomial coefficient records for a single space object.  A PPE message may contain position records, orbital element records, or both. Records should be ordered chronologically by EPOCH_MID and should collectively cover the time span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME] without gaps.

EPOCH.description: Epoch time, in ISO 8601 UTC format (required for non-uniform steps)

ephemerisDataLine.description: A single ephemeris data line (for non-uniform time steps only) Use this format when time intervals between states are irregular. For uniform time steps, use the compact EPHEMERIS_DATA array instead.

OBJECT.description: Satellite name for the first object

CENTER_NAME.description: Origin of reference frame (EARTH, MARS, MOON, etc.)

REFERENCE_FRAME.description: Name of the reference frame (TEME, EME2000, etc.)

REFERENCE_FRAME_EPOCH.description: Epoch of reference frame, if not intrinsic to the definition of the reference frame

COV_REFERENCE_FRAME.description: Reference frame for the covariance matrix

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system used for the orbit state and covariance matrix. (UTC)

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

START_TIME.description: Start of TOTAL time span covered by ephemeris data and covariance data (ISO 8601)

USEABLE_START_TIME.description: Optional start USEABLE time span covered by ephemeris data (ISO 8601)

USEABLE_STOP_TIME.description: Optional end of USEABLE time span covered by ephemeris data (ISO 8601)

STOP_TIME.description: End of TOTAL time span covered by ephemeris data and covariance data (ISO 8601)

INTERPOLATION_DEGREE.description: Recommended interpolation degree for ephemeris data

STEP_SIZE.description: If 0 or omitted: Use EPHEMERIS_DATA_LINES with explicit epochs.

STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.description: Only used when STEP_SIZE > 0. Default is 6.

EPHEMERIS_DATA_LINES.description: Each line contains its own EPOCH timestamp.

POLYNOMIAL_POSITION_RECORDS.description: See PPE schema for record structure and evaluation procedure.

CLASSIFICATION.description: Classification marking of the data in IC/CAPCO Portion-marked format.

CCSDS_OCM_VERS.description: Format version in the form of 'x.y', where 'y' is incremented for minor changes, and 'x' for major changes.

COMMENT.description: Comments (a contiguous set of one or more comment lines may be provided immediately after the version number).

CLASSIFICATION.description: User-defined free-text message classification/caveats of this OCM.

MESSAGE_ID.description: Free-text field containing an ID that uniquely identifies a message from this originator.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Free-text field containing the name of the object.

INTERNATIONAL_DESIGNATOR.description: International designator for the object as assigned by COSPAR.

CATALOG_NAME.description: Satellite catalog source from which 'OBJECT_DESIGNATOR' was obtained.

OBJECT_DESIGNATOR.description: Unique satellite identification designator from the catalog.

ALTERNATE_NAMES.description: Alternate names of this space object.

ORIGINATOR_POC.description: Originator or programmatic Point-of-Contact (PoC) for OCM.

ORIGINATOR_POSITION.description: Contact position of the originator PoC.

TECH_ORG.description: Creating agency or operator for technical contact.

TECH_POSITION.description: Contact position of the technical PoC.

PREVIOUS_MESSAGE_ID.description: ID that uniquely identifies the previous message from this originator.

NEXT_MESSAGE_ID.description: ID that uniquely identifies the next message from this originator.

ADM_MSG_LINK.description: Unique identifier of Attitude Data Messages linked to this OCM.

CDM_MSG_LINK.description: Unique identifier of Conjunction Data Messages linked to this OCM.

PRM_MSG_LINK.description: Unique identifier of Pointing Request Messages linked to this OCM.

RDM_MSG_LINK.description: Unique identifier of Reentry Data Messages linked to this OCM.

TDM_MSG_LINK.description: List of Tracking Data Messages upon which this orbit determination is based.

COUNTRY.description: Country where the space object owner is based.

CONSTELLATION.description: Name of the constellation to which this space object belongs.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Specification of the type of object (e.g., PAYLOAD, ROCKET BODY, DEBRIS).

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system for all absolute time stamps in this OCM, including EPOCH_TZERO.

EPOCH_TZERO.description: Default epoch to which all relative times are referenced in data blocks.

OPS_STATUS.description: Specification of the operational status of the space object.

ORBIT_CATEGORY.description: Specification of the type of orbit (e.g., GEO, LEO).

OCM_DATA_ELEMENTS.description: List of elements of information data blocks included in this message.

SCLK_OFFSET_AT_EPOCH.description: Number of spacecraft clock counts at EPOCH_TZERO (used if TIME_SYSTEM is SCLK).

SCLK_SEC_PER_SI_SEC.description: Number of clock seconds occurring during one SI second (used if TIME_SYSTEM is SCLK).

PREVIOUS_MESSAGE_EPOCH.description: Creation epoch of the previous message from this originator.

NEXT_MESSAGE_EPOCH.description: Anticipated (or actual) epoch of the next message from this originator.

START_TIME.description: Time of the earliest data contained in the OCM.

STOP_TIME.description: Time of the latest data contained in the OCM.

TIME_SPAN.description: Span of time that the OCM covers, measured in days.

TAIMUTC_AT_TZERO.description: Difference (TAI - UTC) in seconds at EPOCH_TZERO.

NEXT_LEAP_TAIMUTC.description: Difference (TAI - UTC) in seconds at NEXT_LEAP_EPOCH.

UT1MUTC_AT_TZERO.description: Difference (UT1 - UTC) in seconds at EPOCH_TZERO.

EOP_SOURCE.description: Source and version of Earth Orientation Parameters used.

INTERP_METHOD_EOP.description: Method used to select or interpolate sequential EOP data.

CELESTIAL_SOURCE.description: Source and version of celestial body ephemeris data used.

X.description: X component of position in the specified reference frame.

COMMENT.description: Comments in the Physical Properties section.

WET_MASS.description: Wet mass of the space object.

DRY_MASS.description: Dry mass of the space object.

OEB_Q1.description: Quaternion component q1 of orientation from OEB to EME2000.

OEB_MAX.description: Maximum dimension of the object along OEB frame axes.

OEB_INT.description: Intermediate dimension along OEB frame axes.

OEB_MIN.description: Minimum dimension of the object along OEB frame axes.

SRP_CONST_AREA.description: Constant area for solar radiation pressure computations.

SRP_UNCERTAINTY.description: Uncertainty in the solar radiation pressure coefficient.

GM.description: Gravitational constant times the mass of the central body.

N_BODY_PERTURBATIONS.description: List of celestial bodies included in n-body perturbations.

FIXED_F10P7.description: Fixed F10.7 solar flux value used.

FIXED_F10P7_MEAN.description: Fixed mean F10.7 solar flux value used.

MAN_BASIS.description: Basis of the maneuver plan (e.g., planned, predicted, estimated).

MAN_REF_FRAME.description: Reference frame for the maneuver data.

MAN_FRAME_EPOCH.description: Epoch of the maneuver reference frame.

MAN_UNITS.description: Units for the maneuver data values.

OD_ID.description: Unique identifier for the orbit determination.

OD_PREV_ID.description: Identifier of the previous orbit determination.

OD_TIME_TAG.description: Time tag of the orbit determination.

OD_OBSERVATIONS_TYPE.description: Types of observations used (e.g., RANGE, DOPPLER).

OD_APRIORI_DATA.description: A priori data used for orbit determination.

TRAJ_TYPE.description: For POLYNOMIAL_POS/POLYNOMIAL_OE, use the corresponding polynomial record arrays.

CARTESIAN_PV.description: Cartesian position and velocity (X, Y, Z, X_DOT, Y_DOT, Z_DOT).

CARTESIAN_PVA.description: Cartesian position, velocity, and acceleration (9 components).

POLYNOMIAL_POS.description: Polynomial coefficients for Cartesian position (and optionally velocity). Associated data in POLYNOMIAL_POSITION_RECORDS.

POLYNOMIAL_OE.description: Polynomial coefficients for classical orbital elements. Associated data in POLYNOMIAL_OE_RECORDS.

STATE_STEP_SIZE.description: Time interval between state vectors in seconds (required for time-series data).

STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.description: 9 = position + velocity + acceleration (adds X_DDOT, Y_DDOT, Z_DDOT)

STATE_DATA.description: Length must be divisible by STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.

POLYNOMIAL_POSITION_RECORDS.description: See PPE schema for record structure and evaluation procedure.

POLYNOMIAL_OE_RECORDS.description: See PPE schema for record structure and evaluation procedure.

PHYSICAL_PROPERTIES.description: Physical properties of the space object.

CREATION_DATE.description: Message creation date in ISO 8601 UTC format.

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system used by all epochs.

START_TIME.description: Start epoch for compact trajectory and condition arrays.

STOP_TIME.description: Stop epoch for compact trajectory and condition arrays.

STEP_SIZE.description: Uniform step size in seconds. Use zero when samples are epoch-tagged elsewhere.

SOURCE_OEM.description: Source OEM ephemeris when conditions were evaluated from orbit ephemeris data.

SOURCE_OCM.description: Source OCM trajectory when conditions were evaluated from comprehensive orbit data.

ATMOSPHERE.description: Atmosphere model request used by the propagator.

ATMOSPHERE_MODEL_REVISION.description: Atmosphere model revision, data release, or configuration hash.

ATMOSPHERE_COUPLING.description: Coupling mode used between the propagator and atmosphere provider.

FLOW_REGIME.description: Flow regime classification for the sampled trajectory.

STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.description: Number of position/velocity components per state sample.

STATE_DATA.description: Flat state array [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, ...] in km and km/s.

SAMPLE_EPOCHS.description: Epochs for irregularly sampled condition arrays.

SPEED_M_PER_S.description: Inertial or relative speed samples in meters per second.

DENSITY_KG_PER_M3.description: Atmospheric density samples in kilograms per cubic meter.

SPEED_OF_SOUND_M_PER_S.description: Speed of sound samples in meters per second.

CONVECTIVE_HEAT_FLUX_W_PER_M2.description: Convective heat flux samples in watts per square meter.

RADIATIVE_HEAT_FLUX_W_PER_M2.description: Radiative heat flux samples in watts per square meter.

STAGNATION_HEAT_FLUX_W_PER_M2.description: Stagnation heat flux samples in watts per square meter.

LOAD_FACTOR_G.description: Normal load factor samples in g.

ANGLE_OF_ATTACK_DEG.description: Angle of attack samples in degrees.

REFERENCE_AREA_M2.description: Vehicle reference area in square meters.

SURFACE_TEMPERATURE_K.description: Wall or surface temperature in kelvin.

Geometry.description: Geometry table with information about geometric properties

ID.description: Unique identifier for the site, BE_NUMBER

SITE_TYPE.description: Site type as defined in SiteType enum

CTR_ID.description: CTR ISO 3166 Numeric code as string

CREATED_BY.description: Identifier of the user who created the site data

MODEL_URL.description: URL for the 3D model of the site

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

OPERATIONAL_STATUS.description: Operational status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, under construction)

PUBLIC_KEY.description: Public part of the cryptographic key, in hexidecimal format

PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private part of the cryptographic key in hexidecimal format, should be kept secret

KEY_ADDRESS.description: Address generated from the cryptographic key

ADDRESS_TYPE.description: Type of the address generated from the cryptographic key

KEY_TYPE.description: Type of the cryptographic key (signing or encryption)

REGION.description: Region of the address (e.g., state or province)

LOCALITY.description: Locality of the address (e.g., city or town)

SIGNED_PAYLOAD.description: The canonical payload that was signed (hex-encoded)

ChainProof.description: Proves a blockchain key derives from the same HD wallet as the signing key

LEGAL_NAME.description: Common name of the entity (person or organization)

FAMILY_NAME.description: Family name or surname of the person

GIVEN_NAME.description: Given name or first name of the person

ADDITIONAL_NAME.description: Additional name or middle name of the person

HONORIFIC_PREFIX.description: Honorific prefix preceding the person's name (e.g., Mr., Dr.)

HONORIFIC_SUFFIX.description: Honorific suffix following the person's name (e.g., Jr., Sr.)

KEYS.description: Cryptographic keys associated with the entity

MULTIFORMAT_ADDRESS.description: Multiformat addresses associated with the entity

SIGNATURE.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical EPM content (hex), signed by the first signing key in KEYS

SIGNATURE_TIMESTAMP.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the EPM was signed

CHAIN_PROOFS.description: Chain binding proofs linking blockchain keys to the same HD wallet

ENTITY_TYPE.description: Type of entity represented by this profile

FUEL_TYPE.description: Fuel Type Used in This Stage

THRUST.description: Thrust Produced by This Stage (in Newtons)
Thrust Produced by the Sustainer (in Newtons)
Thrust Produced by the Engine (in Newtons)

OPERATIONS_POINTS_OF_CONTACT.description: Operations Points of Contact for Launch

MISSION_TYPE.description: Type of the Mission (e.g., Test Flight, Satellite Deployment)

WEATHER_CONDITIONS.description: Weather and Environmental Conditions at Launch

LAUNCH_STATUS.description: Launch Outcome and Status (e.g., Successful, Failed)

MEDIA_LINKS.description: Media Links Related to the Launch

COLA_SCREEN_DURATION.description: Duration of Collision Avoidance Screen (in Seconds)

COLA_RUNS_REQUIRED.description: Number of Required Collision Avoidance Runs

COLA_POINTS_OF_CONTACT.description: Points of Contact for Collision Avoidance

BURN_OUT_VECTORS.description: Burn Out Vectors for the Launch

HIGH_ZENITH_AZIMUTH.description: True if high zenith angle observation

SAT_NO.description: Satellite catalog number of launched object

DERIVED_FROM.description: Source record this event was derived from

TARGET_ORBIT.description: Target orbit type (LEO, MEO, GEO, HEO, SSO, etc.)

OBJECTS_ON_ORBIT.description: Number of objects placed on orbit

EPOCH.description: Event epoch in ISO 8601 UTC format.
Epoch of closest approach or violation in ISO 8601 UTC format.

CREATION_DATE.description: Message creation date in ISO 8601 UTC format.

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system used by all epochs.

LAUNCH_EPOCH.description: Launch epoch in ISO 8601 UTC format.

START_TIME.description: Evaluation start epoch in ISO 8601 UTC format.

STOP_TIME.description: Evaluation stop epoch in ISO 8601 UTC format.

STEP_SIZE.description: Uniform propagation step size in seconds.

ROCKET_CONFIGURATION.description: Rocket configuration used by the simulation.

EVENT_RECORDS.description: Launch event records used as source or result context.

DETECTIONS.description: Launch detection records used as source or result context.

BOOST_TRACKS.description: Boost or missile-track style records used as source or result context.

BURN_OUT_VECTORS.description: Burnout vectors produced or consumed by the ascent simulation.

ATMOSPHERE.description: Atmosphere model request used by the ascent analysis.

HYPERSONIC_CONDITIONS.description: Hypersonic conditions computed along the ascent trajectory.

PROPAGATOR_NAME.description: Propagator module, engine, or adapter name.

PROPAGATOR_VERSION.description: Propagator module, engine, or adapter version.

TIME_FROM_LAUNCH_S.description: Time from launch samples in seconds.

SPEED_M_PER_S.description: Speed samples in meters per second.

HEAT_FLUX_W_PER_M2.description: Heat flux samples in watts per square meter.

FLIGHT_PATH_ANGLE_DEG.description: Flight path angle samples in degrees.

IIP_LATITUDE_DEG.description: Instantaneous impact point latitude samples in degrees.

IIP_LONGITUDE_DEG.description: Instantaneous impact point longitude samples in degrees.

MAX_DYNAMIC_PRESSURE_EPOCH.description: Epoch of maximum dynamic pressure in ISO 8601 UTC format.

MAX_HEAT_FLUX_W_PER_M2.description: Maximum heat flux in watts per square meter.

MAX_HEAT_FLUX_EPOCH.description: Epoch of maximum heat flux in ISO 8601 UTC format.

ORBIT_INSERTION_EPOCH.description: Orbit insertion epoch in ISO 8601 UTC format.

PAYLOAD_INJECTION_ERROR_M_PER_S.description: Payload injection velocity error in meters per second.
